# AvökatFinder Hungary
> The English-language directory of lawyers and law firms in Hungary for expats, foreign nationals and international businesses.

## Main Pages
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/: Home — find an English-speaking lawyer in Hungary
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/lawyers/: Directory of verified law firms and lawyers in Hungary
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/: Legal glossary — plain-English definitions of Hungary legal terms
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/blog/: Expat legal guides and property law articles for Hungary
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/about/: About AvökatFinder Hungary
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/contact/: Contact us

- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/foldihivatal/

- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/kozjegyzo/
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/lakasbiztositas-hu/
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/taj-szam/
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/tulajdoni-lap/

- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/ugyved/
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/ugyvedi-leteti-hu/
- https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/vagyonszerzesi-illetek/

## Site Info
- Language: English
- Audience: Expats, foreign nationals, international property buyers and businesses in Hungary
- Content: Law firm directory, legal glossary, expat legal guides
- Last updated: 2026-04-30
- Sitemap: https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/sitemap.xml

## Permissions
User-agent: *
Allow: /

## Tools

- [Hungary Legal Cost Calculator](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/tools/legal-cost-calculator/) — Interactive calculator for property purchase costs, Kft. formation, Golden Visa fees
- [Hungarian Legal Document Templates](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/tools/nda-template/) — Bilingual NDA, retainer letter, and Bar Association complaint templates
- [How to Choose a Lawyer in Hungary](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/tools/how-to-choose-a-lawyer/) — Interactive decision tree and checklist for selecting Hungarian legal counsel
- [Legal Tools Hub](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/tools/) — Directory of all free Hungarian legal tools: calculators, templates, and decision guides
- [Budapest Lawyers](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/cities/budapest/) — Find English-speaking lawyers in Budapest, Hungary
- [Debrecen Lawyers](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/cities/debrecen/) — Find English-speaking lawyers in Debrecen, Hungary
- [Győr Lawyers](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/cities/gyor/) — Find English-speaking lawyers in Győr, Hungary
- [Kecskemét Lawyers](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/cities/kecskemet/) — Find English-speaking lawyers in Kecskemét, Hungary
- [Miskolc Lawyers](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/cities/miskolc/) — Find English-speaking lawyers in Miskolc, Hungary
- [Pécs Lawyers](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/cities/pecs/) — Find English-speaking lawyers in Pécs, Hungary
- [Szeged Lawyers](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/cities/szeged/) — Find English-speaking lawyers in Szeged, Hungary
- [Szolnok Lawyers](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/cities/szolnok/) — Find English-speaking lawyers in Szolnok, Hungary
- [munkajog](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/munkajog/) — Hungarian Labour Law (Munkajog) — employment contracts, dismissal rights, and minimum wage for expats
- [oroklesi-jog](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/oroklesi-jog/) — Hungarian Inheritance Law (Öröklési Jog) — succession, wills, forced shares, and estate tax
- [adatvedelem-hu](https://hungary.avokatfinder.com/glossary/adatvedelem-hu/) — Hungarian GDPR and data protection law (adatvédelem), NAIH enforcement, and compliance requirements
